Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.label: Apache
Vehicles.VehicleBuildDef.description:
A purpose-built attack helicopter, the Apache trades transport capacity for heavy armour and a nose-mounted chain gun. It excels at sustained strafing runs against ground forces and can take off vertically, requiring no prepared strip.

Crewed by a pilot and a gunner, both stations are required to fly and fight.

<color=#bb8f04>Crew:</color> Pilot x1, Gunner x1
<color=#bb8f04>Fuel type:</color> Chemfuel
